name: Magic Lemon Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk
1 teaspoon grated lemon rind (or 1/4 tsp lemon extract)
Baked pie shell, 8 inches in diameter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sweetened condensed milk, lemon juice, lemon rind, and egg yolks.
2. Pour the mixture into the prepared baked pie shell.
3. Prepare the meringue by beating egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat until the meringue holds its shape.
4. Spread the meringue over the top of the custard filling, covering the surface completely.
5. Place the pie in a moderate oven (350°F) and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the meringue is lightly browned.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature before serving.
Posted by Stephen Ceideberg; October 2, 1992.
